title: Advanced Perspective Mod
description: Advanced Perspective Mod (Forge 1.8.9) – Toggle third-person back and third-person front separately with dedicated keybinds! Skip the annoying front cam delay and instantly check your surroundings in PvP. A must-have for Bedwars & Skywars players!
body:
📜About This Mod

The Advanced Perspective Mod is a simple yet powerful tool that enhances the way you view your surroundings in Minecraft 1.8.9. Unlike the default perspective system, this mod allows you to toggle third-person (back) and third-person (front) views separately with dedicated keybinds.

This mod is perfect for players who want a quick way to look around, especially in PvP or Bedwars games, without getting slowed down by the default front-facing camera.

🎮 How to Use the Mod
🔹 Keybinds & Functionality
Key	Action
F	Switch between first-person and third-person (back view)
G	Switch between first-person and third-person (front view)

Press F to look behind you instantly, skipping the annoying front camera.

Press G to enable the front camera (third-person (front view) for taking screenshots, checking your armor, or seeing enemies behind you.

Pressing the same key again will return you to first-person mode.

🤔 Why Use This Mod?

1️⃣ Bypasses the Default Front Camera Delay

In vanilla Minecraft, switching perspectives includes the front-facing camera, which slows down movement.

This mod skips that step when toggling between first-person and third-person back views.

2️⃣ Perfect for PvP & Hypixel Players

The Free Look mod is banned on Hypixel, but this mod lets you quickly check your surroundings without breaking the rules.

Quickly peek behind you in Bedwars or Skywars without rotating your camera manually.

3️⃣ Separate Key for Third-person (front View)

Vanilla Minecraft forces you to cycle through perspectives.

This mod gives you a dedicated key (G) for Third-person (front view) (looking at your character’s face).

4️⃣ Lightweight & Easy to Use

No complicated settings—just install and press F or G!

Works with any other mods and does not interfere with your controls.

❓ FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions)
Q: Does this mod give me Free Look like Lunar Client?

A: No, this mod does not provide Free Look (which is banned on Hypixel). It only modifies default perspective toggling for convenience.

Q: Will this work on other versions of Minecraft?

A: No, this mod is specifically built for Minecraft Forge 1.8.9. It will not work on newer versions.

Q: Can I change the keybinds?

A: Yes! You can change the keybinds in Minecraft Settings → Controls → Perspective Mod.

Q: Does this work on Hypixel?

A: Yes! This mod is completely allowed on Hypixel because it does not break any rules.
